commands.review_summary:
Adds a native .NET/WinForms Windows taskbar tray companion, Windows build/package/smoke/Crabbox scripts and CI, documentation, a tray screenshot asset, package scripts, and release-note text.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the mutable validation download, the real AppData log-file deletion path, and the package/assembly version split. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
